description: A forward mounted fixed Railgun firing 155mm slugs at 2380m/s every 2.5 seconds. Each slug fired by the railgun has the same kinetic energy as a school bus travelling at 500km/h.

displayName: An AB-4X that doesn't feel like a V6 minivan.
description: Responsive thrust curve until you hit the afterburners then at altitude you can pass mach 3.
Decoy for radar guided missiles like the F-35 has.
Increase the maximum active AI aircraft per faction. Extends mission editor slider up to 128 and optionally overrides the limit at runtime.
Waypoint navigation system for aircraft with camera trail visualization. Create, save, and follow flight paths in the mission editor.
This is the Advanced Combat Overlay over map thing in my TV Missile hud.... JUST that with the change that in the MFD it shows the missile track lost and ETA.
Anomie Cargo Request lets players call in AI-handled cargo logistics support, reducing the need for dedicated logistics players.

This mod adds a counter-battery scanner for Nuclear Option that detects hostile ground missile launches, marks estimated launch origins on the big map, tracks active contacts, and confirms destroyed launcher units with a temporary green blinking kill indicator.

Colors real human players separately from AI on the dynamic map, minimap, HUD markers, target markers, and target lists. Friendly players are shown in green, enemy players in orange, while AI units keep the game original blue/red faction colors. Map hover names and normal unit tooltips are preserved.
This program is a testing tool to check out your mods if they are running unstable.
Shows a compact rearm status HUD with queued rearm ETA, progress bar, and completion feedback while the minimap is visible.

Adds a standalone rescue beacon system for Nuclear Option that detects downed friendly pilots, marks rescue zones on the big map, and lets friendly helicopters or VTOLs complete local CSAR-style recovery events.
Adds a rank 2 supersonic multirole fighter aircraft. The Viper is eternal.
A cargo plane mod for Nuclear Option.
Adds an honest to god playable MiG-15 aircraft.
Adds an agile rank 0 scout and attack helicopter capable of long range reconnaissance able to triangulate ground radars, strafe tank columns and generally be the low rank eye in the sky.
Modding framework and utilities for Nuclear Option. Note: The NOMNOM compatible version has some features removed.
This mod is similar to yappinator except this can affect things such as radar an ir locking sounds even the sounds generated by weapons ( a-10 brrrrrrt is being checked )
Plugin configuration manager for BepInEx
Gives IR missiles off boresight capability and head tracked launch.

A light combat drone with superb kinematics. Features a custom model with unique flight performance and destruction, a custom MFD and damage display, 7 liveries, no G-loc, and self-destruction when the eject key is pressed.

A heavy BDF tri-surface twin engine multirole fighter with high payload capacity and extreme kinematic performace. Features custom audio, numerous weapon pylons, a refined fly by wire, and custom music by the creators of the Nuclear Option Soundtrack.

The BOTE adds player controllable ships with weapon choices and custom systems including resupplies and vehicle deployment. Current Ships include: OTB-31 Landing Craft, Shard class corvette, Dynamo class destroyer, Hyperion class fleet carrier.
save and load presets of the advanced camera controls menu
Removes the CanSlingLoad restriction from the cargo hook system, allowing you to hook any unit — aircraft, buildings, anything. Same controls, stock physics unchanged.

Adds a working rear pusher propeller to the Chicane, turning the helicopter into a compound helicopter: blade-angle pusher with a turbine-budget power model, manual thrust override, mass-adaptive lateral trim, an improved main-rotor drag model with Ibis rotor visuals, a battle-damage model with bent blade meshes, and a live pusher/turbine/rotor MFD with stock-style FAULT/INOPERABLE indication.
Removes the Chicane's external wings when no wing payload is equipped, while preserving QoL/vanilla RCS behavior.

Welds the Aryx MC-260 Chimera's Fuselage_Top_Rear panel into the airframe so the V-tail no longer visibly twists the rear fuselage. Single-piece weld via the game's own AeroPart.MergeWithParent; vanilla flight model preserved.
IR seeker growl audio mod for Nuclear Option with profile-driven seeker behavior and configurable audio.
Equalize modded airframes and ground units with vanilla in Inventory and Factory (Production)
Allows the user to change their in-game name separate from their Steam profile name.

Shows you how much time you have until the engines flame out from fuel starvation, accounting to your current throttle level, and quantity of fuel onboard. Calculates fuel burn rate and displays an endurance timer with said values. Updates every second.

For those who need the grid reference of their targets instantly without having to open the map and finding it manually, here is a mod i made which paints it directly to your HUD for the target you have selected.
QoL mod to toggle player names on and off and change icon colours in HUD and MAP.
Replaces in-game sounds with custom audio packs, including radio chatter, hot-swappable sound packs, and shuffle support.
Core framework required for mods utilising blueprinter.
Enhanced Nuclear Option mission editor: group copy/paste, mass selection, node graph UI, hold position, no-clip, free camera. Original by nikkorap; maintained by Endar728 with copy-paste and fixes.
Bind a button or key to drop all targets and target incoming missiles.
Client-side Nuclear Option mod that replaces the main menu background with an image from the player's PC.
Client-side Nuclear Option mod that lets players choose units per HUD readout instead of relying only on the game's single global metric/imperial setting.
Shoshanas Balliistic Strike console is a Mod where you can launch a type of payloads as hypersonic or custom MT Nukes with a fee.
Shoshanas Host Web Panel is a mod to edit money/Airframes on players in realtime.

Ever had the problem that you select 2 targets at the same time if i you use the keybind on the MAP? DON'T BE AFRAID ANYMORE this mod is all you need.. i fixed it with literally 5 minutes of time and 57 lines of code.
Shoshanas Spawn Tool is a mod that enables you to spawn units on the ground, air and sea.
Shoshanas Toggle Handbreak rebinds the handbreak to a toggle instead of a hold action

BepInEx companion plugin for Aryx's F-16M / King Viper. Tunes wing, LERX, wingtip, and transonic vapor effects for smoother AoA vapor onset, better wingtip vortex placement, and improved transonic cone behavior.
Real-time frontline visualization on the map. Shows faction-colored territory control and battle lines.
[Voice Pack] Expanded AWACS Galaxy dialogue pack.
[Voice Pack] Russian combat radio chatter style.
A Game Master / free camera utility mod for Nuclear Option that lets the host or local player spawn aircraft, vehicles, ships, buildings, and scenery in real time.

displayName: Ibis Belly Turret Cargo Hook Patch
description: QoL-compatible UH-90 Ibis patch that keeps QoL's belly turret slot, removes CargoHook from that slot, and adds a separate cargo-hook-only slot near the original cargo hook position.
Animated UH-90 Ibis door gun stow/deploy mod.

Adds a tier-priority power-budget allocator to the Ibis (UtilityHelo1) so that the coaxial main rotor is fed first and the rotorless DuctedFan pushers consume only the leftover. Prevents the rotor from starving under heavy collective when the pushers demand full power. Originally part of ChicanePusherLab; split out as a standalone mod from v1.0.49 onward.
[Voice Pack] Jester AI backseater personality pack.
Adds the ability to host and join LAN games from the main menu without needing to execute commands via the CLI.
A comprehensive driveable ground vehicles mod, adding over 6 vehicles, ~50 weapons, and new mechanics.
[Voice Pack] High-energy personality for intense combat.
Aryx RAH-72 compound coaxial helicopter — pusher-prop thrust, coaxial rotor blur, and a tuned flight model.
Allows you to turn the Ifrit into an EW aircraft with mini jammers, more ARADs, a Radome, and an ECM upgrade to give you even more charge.
This mod disables firing laser guided rockets at unlased targets. So for example chicane will only ever fire at a maximum of 4 targets, and only at those that it actually has line of sight to.
Tiny clientside mod to make dealing with lots of liveries a little less horrible.
save and load preset Loadouts
Belarusian (Беларуская) translation for Nuclear Option. Full translation including UI, missions, scenarios, vehicles, weapons.
French (Français) translation for Nuclear Option. Translates UI, encyclopedia, hints, and tooltips — 1,427 entries.
German (Deutsch) translation for Nuclear Option. Translates UI, encyclopedia, hints, and tooltips — 1,427 entries.
Korean (한국어) translation for Nuclear Option. Translates UI, encyclopedia, hints, and tooltips — 1,427 entries.
Russian (Русский) translation for Nuclear Option. Translates UI, encyclopedia, hints, and tooltips — 1,427 entries.
Spanish (Español) translation for Nuclear Option. Translates UI, encyclopedia, hints, and tooltips — 1,427 entries.
Ukrainian (Українська) translation for Nuclear Option. ~1800 translated strings including UI, missions, scenarios, vehicles, weapons.
Load custom terrain and maps via AssetBundles. Create and share custom battle environments.

Display custom videos, images, and live streams on the Multi-Function Displays (MFDs) of your Nuclear Option cockpit. Per-aircraft slot layouts for all 12 aircraft, multi-slot system (each physical MFD screen can hold a different source), YouTube/Twitch URL playback via bundled yt-dlp, live streams via ffmpeg, in-game edit mode, rotation support.
Play custom videos on the MFD display in-game. Supports YouTube and Twitch streaming via yt-dlp.
Nuclear Option Tactical Tools is an immersion and QoL focused gameplay mod.
autopilot mod for nuclear option
Adds a search bar in the mission select to make selecting missions easier.

Description: This mod changes the amount of targets that an aircraft can laser designate at once. For example, a cricket can lase 2 targets in the base game. With the basic configuration- Moar Lasers allows you to laser designate 5 targets or more via the config variables.
Tacview telemetry exporter for mission debriefing.
A mod to allow dynamic vibration feedback in Nuclear Option for any controller.
BepInEx plugin for Nuclear Option to replace the Mouse Cursor
Force Feedback Plugin for Nuclear Option
Using NOFFB by 7ep3s as a reference, reimplements FFB without needing an external executable running, and adds some other features including bumpiness.
Global FPS limiter for improved performance stability.
A BepInEx mod and unity editor tool combo for making Nuclear option Liveries with full control over the material.
Nuclear option map loader
Collection of fixes to get UUVR work with Nuclear Option
This builds of NOFBBs telemetry code to bring vibration motor functionality to Winwing flight sticks. Needs Winwing SimAppPro.
Various additions to Nuclear Option including marking Steam friends and a dedicated RWR display.
A client-side mod that adds wingman highlighting in Nuclear Option.
Block Blast puzzle game on your MFD cockpit display in Nuclear Option

Adds per-axis response curves (Linear, Power, SCurve, Logistic, Cubic) for any gamepad. Tune deadzone, saturation, shape, sensitivity, and inversion individually for Pitch, Roll, Yaw, Pan View, and Tilt View. Works with DualSense, Xbox controllers, generic gamepads, joysticks, and rudder pedals via Rewired. Keyboard and mouse pass through untouched.
Nuclear Option Camera Fix for uuvr
Adds in game voice chat to Nuclear Option
Improved NVG for Nuclear Option. Provides both built in and customizable NvG filters.
Displays weapons used for kills in the killfeed. Only works in single player.
[Voice Pack] Solo Wing Pixy combat dialogue.
[Voice Pack] Classic backseater dialogue lines.
Various bug fixes and Quality of Life for the Quality of Life mod
A major overhaul mod for Nuclear Option. QoL adds custom weapons, units, features, plus hundreds of fixes and parity adjustments.
Visualize building damage and repair status with health bars. See repair progress in real-time.
Replaces Nuclear Option's English Voice Warning System with Russian equivalents.
In-game inspector and debugging tools for applications made with Unity3D game engine
This is the TV Missile Hud where it shows the missiles POV and Missile trails.
[Voice Pack] Custom AWACS dialogue lines for Sky Eye.
Airshow smoke trail effects for aircraft. Network-synchronized with in-game keybind and HOTAS support.

Independent engine throttle control for HOTAS dual throttle setups. Each lever controls its own engine side (left/right) with per-engine afterburner effects. Modded clients only match with each other in the lobby browser (Application.version marker).
Scramjet equipped Ifrit. Need mach 4+ above 60k feet to activate.

Take manual control of the cockpit target camera for free pan/tilt/zoom even without a target lock, with automatic ground-point tracking. Pan to aim, stop and the plugin raycasts where you're looking and snaps the camera onto that world point — tracks it as the aircraft moves around (JTAC / lasing-pod style designation). Up to 40× zoom with zoom-aware fine sensitivity, MFD HUD overlay (RNG/ALT/HDG/GRID/MODE/Mag), IR↔Color toggle, floating-origin safe lock storage, self-collision filter, auto-revert when the game locks a real target. Multiplayer compatible — client-side only.

Estimates the position of selected targets after datalink is lost, using dead reckoning (last known velocity x elapsed time). Aircraft get X cross marker + direction line + uncertainty circle (60s per selection). Ships get square marker + direction line. Ground vehicles get square marker snapped to nearest road point (recalculated every 2s). F10 to toggle.
Companion BepInEx plugin that tunes the FS-3 Ternion vapor effects without modifying the original Ternion asset.
Adds a third PMC (Private Military Company) faction to multiplayer and singleplayer missions. PMC units fight independently with their own objectives, airbases, and vehicle deployments.

displayName: Third Person HUD Map Pip Fix
description: Companion BepInEx plugin for QoL that suppresses the HUD targeting pip while the map is open, preventing map target selection from also selecting a world target behind the map.
Group copy/paste for units in the mission editor. Ctrl+C to copy, Ctrl+V to paste at cursor, Ctrl+D to duplicate in place.
Description: All credits to nikkorap for the original mod. I am just maintaining it. A fan favourite mod that allows any weapon on any pylon.
Universal VR mod for Unity games
Possess and directly control ground vehicles, ships, and other units. Includes camera system and targeting.
Comprehensive weather control system. Adjust time of day, wind, clouds, and dynamic weather conditions.
Core framework required for custom WSO Voice Packs.
Yaw On Mouse allows you to control the Yaw axis instead of the Roll axis with the Mouse
A Moza Flight Stick FFB mod for Nuclear Option
